case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. CHRISTINE MENDE

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MENDE, CHRISTINE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-24-2021
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200024474), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. SERVED FEB-01-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENDE, CHRISTINE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 200029474) AS TO DEFENDANT MENDE, CHRISTINE
DECLARATION RE:STATEMENT OF EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 200029474) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDE, CHRISTINE $10,182.08 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,182.08, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200029474)
DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200029474) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
